text: Eating a balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep, as it helps your brain and body recover. Good sleep also supports your mental health by reducing stress and improving your mood. To stay healthy, try to maintain a work-life balance by setting time aside for hobbies, loved ones, and relaxation. When you prioritise these daily habits, you feel more energetic and focused in both your personal and professional life.
